LAW AND MOTION 301, HEARING ON DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION. THE MATTER IS ARGUED. AT THE CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT CRAFTY CALIFORNIA LLC ("CRAFTY")'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS GRANTED. SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING. A PROPOSED ORDER IS SUBMITTED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar May-13-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTs CRAFT CALIFORNIA LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY, and CRAFTY LLC's, AN UNKOWN ENTITY Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration.

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Amir H. Seyedfarshi, Esq., of Employment Rights Lawyers, APC, (424) 777-0964, for Plaintiff.
Julian Camper, Esq., of Littler Mendelson, (619) 232-0441, for Defendants.

The matter is argued. At the conclusion of argument, the court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant Crafty California LLC ("Crafty")'s motion to compel arbitration is granted.

***See Word minutes for complete ruling***
